subject: Project Management
title: The Signatories
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on The Signatories.

hook.text: The 17 manifesto authors weren't corporate executives — they were working programmers.

buildup.text: Kent Beck brought XP. Jeff Sutherland and Ken Schwaber brought Scrum. Alistair Cockburn brought Crystal.

discovery.text: Martin Fowler, Robert Martin, and Ward Cunningham were among tech's most respected thinkers.

twist.text: They disagreed on methods. The manifesto was the tiny overlap where all 17 could say 'yes.'

climax.text: Their diversity was the manifesto's strength — it wasn't one method, but a shared philosophy.

punchline.text: They agreed on almost nothing — except what mattered.

quiz.question: What method did Kent Beck contribute to the Agile movement?
